mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_email (user_id, email_type, email, email_masked, verify_status, verified_at, bind_source, bounce_status, last_notify_at, status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{emailType}, #{email}, #{emailMasked}, #{verifyStatus}, #{verifiedAt}, #{bindSource}, #{bounceStatus}, #{lastNotifyAt}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user_email WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 1 ORDER BY email_type ASC, id DESC
SELECT * FROM user_email WHERE email = #{email} AND email_type = 'PRIMARY' AND verify_status = 'VERIFIED' AND status = 1 LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE user_email SET verify_status = 'INVALID', bounce_status = 'HARD_BOUNCE', update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3) WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE user_email SET last_notify_at = #{lastNotifyAt}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3) WHERE id = #{id}
